welcome.title: Welcome back
welcome.description: Here's an overview of your account.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.description: Get started with the SaaS Starter. Complete these steps to set up your project.

steps.cloneRepo: Clone the repository and run bun install
steps.configureEnv: Configure your .env file with database and auth credentials
steps.runMigrations: Run database migrations with bun run db:migrate
steps.startDev: Start the dev server with bun run dev
steps.exploreDashboard: Explore this dashboard and replace cards with your own
steps.readDocs: Read the README for architecture and deployment guides
